name: io.github.ilyautov/moysklad-mcp-ru
title: MoySklad MCP (RU)
description: MoySklad JSON API 1.2 in your AI assistant — schema-driven, safety-gated document writes.

environmentVariables.name: MOYSKLAD_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: MoySklad personal access token (Настройки → Пользователи → Токены доступа). Optional if credentials are stored in ~/.moysklad-mcp/cabinets.json.

environmentVariables.name: MOYSKLAD_ALLOW_WRITE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to allow document writes (create/post/delete). Off by default. Point only at a TEST cabinet.
